generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values duty and order, I've been thinking about our alliance commitments. While some argue we should reduce our role, history shows that strong alliances are the foundation of national security. Look at how NATO's collective defense has deterred aggression for decades. We can't afford to weaken that. It's not just about us—it's about maintaining the international order we've built. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurity
